input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.9.4.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.9.4.3
            TITLE: function - the cockpit main switch may act through a relay
